visual_health_inference.P2_mexican_mint: Based on discernible images, the plant is in good health. Leaves are turgid, green, and show no signs of wilting or discoloration. Soil moisture appears adequate.
visual_health_inference.unmonitored_money_plant: Based on discernible images, the plant is in good health. The single leaf remains green and turgid. Water level fluctuations were temporary and resolved, suggesting active maintenance. No signs of stress or disease.
visual_health_inference.overall_summary: Both plants appear healthy when visible. The primary challenge to health assessment is the intermittent lack of visual data due to camera issues.

anomalies.description: Severe underexposure or camera malfunction in images [T-2] and [CURRENT], rendering subjects largely or entirely indiscernible. This significantly hampers continuous monitoring and introduces uncertainty.
anomalies.impact: Prevents accurate, continuous health assessment for significant periods.

anomalies.description: A temporary drop in the Money Plant's water level was observed in [T-3], followed by replenishment in [T-1].
anomalies.impact: Indicates active intervention or a temporary oversight in monitoring, but was resolved.

vision_report.narrative_description: This chronological audit reveals a generally stable and healthy indoor botanical setup, albeit with significant intermittent visual monitoring challenges. The Mexican Mint in the black pot consistently displays turgid, green foliage and moist soil whenever discernible, indicating good health and adequate care. The Money Plant in the white cup, undergoing water propagation, also appears healthy with a vibrant green leaf. Minor fluctuations in its water level were observed, with a temporary decrease followed by replenishment, suggesting active maintenance. The most critical observation is the recurring issue of severe underexposure or camera malfunction in images [T-2] and [CURRENT], which renders the plants largely or entirely invisible. This technical anomaly prevents a continuous and comprehensive health assessment for significant portions of the monitoring period, introducing uncertainty regarding the plants' state during these dark intervals. When visible, both specimens exhibit robust health, but the reliability of the monitoring system itself is compromised.
vision_report.confidence: Medium-High (High for discernible images, Low for indiscernible images due to technical issues. Overall confidence is tempered by the monitoring gaps).
